title: kamen rider gavv
description: eating food allow you to create minions which you can use to transform into gavv
body:
you have a 25% off spawning with a gavv henshin belt eating certain food will pop out a gochizo

with the gavv henshin belt you be able to transform into kamen rider gavv

all food eaten are parts off tag so you can add other modded food into them to make them function (just use datapack to add the item into a tag)

you get the food from candy man (use furnace to give a village the job in current version) or wandering traders

you can drop the gochizo to let them roam about
 
at the moment you can be a human, granute, a half granute (gavv) or granute (stomatch family)

when the game roll what you if the first roll is a granute then there be another role if your full or half (half being gavv)

based off the tv show kamen rider gavv
